items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
items.description: In the latest trading session, Goldman Sachs (GS) closed at $916.04, marking a +1.2% move from the previous day.

items.title: Big Bank CEOs received serious pay bumps in 2025
items.description: CEOS from the biggest banks — JPMorgan Chase (JPM), Bank of America (BAC), Citigroup (C), Wells Fargo (WFC), Morgan Stanley (MS), and Goldman Sachs (GS) — all earned at least $40 million in 2025, their total pay increases rising by $45.3 million. Yahoo Finance Senior Bank Reporter David Hollerith examines these pay increases reported by major bank executives as the Trump administration lifted banking regulations last year. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Market Chatter: AMC Entertainment Seeks $2.5 Billion to Refinance Existing Debt
items.description: AMC Entertainment (AMC) is seeking a $750 million term loan B, along with $1.73 billion in other sec

items.title: Why Sunrun could be the next target for an activist investor
items.description: Investing.com -- A massive fourth-quarter share accumulation by Goldman Sachs Group Inc (NYSE:GS) has sparked speculation that Sunrun Inc (NASDAQ:RUN) may be emerging as a prime activist target. The investment bank recently disclosed a position of nearly 15 million shares, a concentrated bet that appears to be held on behalf of a client rather than as a standard asset management play.

items.title: Goldman Sachs to drop race, gender and LGBTQ+ criteria from board evaluations
items.description: The move follows pressure from an activist shareholder group seeking end to DEI requirements
